name: WFBE_NEURODEF_FORTIF_WALL_ROW
notes: FORTIF PACK (Ray, verbatim gist: 'Fortifications! Not fortresses - useful items like a row of concrete walls'). CONCRETE WALL ROW: 10x Concrete_Wall_EP1 in one solid straight run at the HQ 2.2 m overlap pitch (panel length ENGINE-MEASURED on the offline 1.64 rig: boundingBox dx = 2.574 m -> 0.374 m overlap per seam, no see-through gaps). Total run ~22.4 m of tall solid concrete: bullet cover + ground-level LoS block. Passive - zero gunner-slot children, zero AI. Array centered on the anchor; z=0 everywhere; wall long axis = model X (dir 0).
